title: × Asplenoceterach newmanii
taxonomy: × Asplenoceterach newmanii is a hybrid species, classified within the family Aspleniaceae. It is a combination of Asplenium (a genus of ferns) and Ceterach (a genus of rock cap ferns). The hybridization of these two genera results in a unique species. The classification of × Asplenoceterach newmanii is a subject of ongoing research in the field of botany. Further studies are needed to fully understand its taxonomic position within the Aspleniaceae family.
